rejected_findings.goal: Use PHP 8.3 for acode Laravel test and migrate verification so SQLite testing works without sandbox escalation
rejected_findings.impact: M2-T2 cannot be safely completed through verify.py while required tests use default PHP 8.2 without pdo_sqlite
rejected_findings.next_action: Update .ai-context/acode.config.json test and migrate commands to /usr/bin/php8.3 artisan, then rerun CONFIG-SMOKE verify.
rejected_findings.reason: User installed php8.2-sqlite3; default PHP 8.2 now has pdo_sqlite/sqlite3, so switching verify commands to PHP 8.3 is no longer needed.
rejected_findings.recommendation: Approve and execute this tiny config requirement before activating M2-T2.
